conditionalDefaults.reason: LSP-backed semantic code editing. Only auto-installs when uv is detected.

sequential-thinking.name: Sequential Thinking
sequential-thinking.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for architecture and debugging.

context7.name: Context7
context7.description: Library documentation lookup. Free tier works without a key.

memory.name: Memory
memory.description: Local knowledge graph for cross-session persistence (JSON on disk).

playwright.name: Playwright
playwright.description: Real browser automation for UI verification and E2E testing. ~150MB Chromium download on first run.

postInstall.message: Playwright will download Chromium (~150MB) on first use. Run `npx playwright install chromium` to pre-download.

filesystem.name: Filesystem
filesystem.description: Sandboxed filesystem access. Note: Claude Code has built-in Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep; this MCP is mostly redundant but useful for non-Claude-Code clients.

serena.name: Serena
serena.description: LSP-backed semantic code editing across languages. Powerful for refactoring.
serena.prerequisites: Requires `uv` (Python package manager). Install: `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh`

chrome-devtools.name: Chrome DevTools
chrome-devtools.description: Live Chrome session debugging — performance, console, network. Complements Playwright.

sqlite.name: SQLite
sqlite.description: Local SQLite database access — actively maintained.

time.name: Time
time.description: Timezone math and time utilities. Tiny but occasionally essential.

codesight-mcp.name: Codesight
codesight-mcp.description: Tree-sitter AST, 66 languages, 34 tools, 2,495 tests, 6-step path validation, byte-offset retrieval. Claims ~99% token reduction on repo-wide retrieval. Hardened.
codesight-mcp.prerequisites: Set CODESIGHT_ALLOWED_ROOTS env var to the repos it is permitted to read.

code-graph-mcp.name: Code Graph
code-graph-mcp.description: AST-backed code knowledge graph (10 languages). Claims 6-49x token reduction on repo-wide review and impact analysis. Complements Serena.
code-graph-mcp.prerequisites: Works best on repos already indexed. Runs locally, no external calls.

code-review-graph.name: Code Review Graph
code-review-graph.description: Tree-sitter AST + local SQLite graph, tuned for code review. Claims 6.8-49x token reduction on diff review.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: GitHub API access — repos, issues, PRs, code search.

setup.instructions: Create a GitHub personal access token with `repo`, `read:org`, `read:user` scopes. Set as GITHUB_TOKEN env var or paste when prompted.

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Read and write Notion pages, databases, comments.

setup.instructions: Create a Notion integration, copy the internal integration token, share pages with the integration in Notion UI.
Create a personal API key in Linear settings. Paste when prompted or set LINEAR_API_KEY.

figma.name: Figma
figma.description: Read Figma designs, create FigJam diagrams, manage Code Connect mappings.

setup.instructions: Authenticate via the Figma desktop app or provide a personal access token.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Read Slack channels, send messages, search history.

setup.instructions: Create a Slack app, add scopes (channels:history, chat:write, users:read), install to workspace, copy bot token.
